import React from 'react'; import '../styles/Auth.css'; const Home = () => { return (

Welcome to MindScroll

The Educational Social Media Platform

Share knowledge, learn from others, and build an educational community. Our AI-powered content filtering ensures only educational content is shared.

📚 Share Knowledge

Post educational content, images, and resources

🤖 AI Filtering

Automatic verification that content is educational

👥 Connect

💬 Engage

Comment, like, and discuss educational topics

); }; export default Home;
